productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Olive Waist Pouch
description: Style NoteGet stylish with this vital gear waist-bag! Wear this to your college and shopping sprees. Perfect even for those short day trips, this bag comes with ample space to stash away your stuff and carry it with much ease and comfort both as a duffel bag or as a sling one.Product DetailsHandbag with click clock fastened flapVelcro closure on the sides through which your belt can be inserted One main compartment fastened by a toggle strap and has mesh pocket insideOne zippered pocket on the front and side pockets fastened by velcro closureMaterial and CareBlended polyesterWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 23 cmWidth: 17 cmDepth: 4 cm
